[about]  [projects]  [writing]

My name is John Holopainen Hadaway. I am an aspiring technologist and designer, broadly interested in the ways that we connect, coordinate, and coexist.

At the moment, I am learning more about cities, different civic, social, and web technologies, human-computer interaction, and information design, as well as doing my civil service at the Design Museum in Helsinki.

Previously, I worked in urban research and development, digital design, and strategy, received a degree in history from the University of Chicago, and briefly studied architecture at the Architectural Association School of Architecture.

In my logged-off hours, I like to listen to music, cook, write, and rest. If any of the above interests you, I would love to get in touch for any (or no) reason. I am reachable via Twitter, Linkedin, and email. Here is my CV for your prodded snooping.
